title: PluieSoleil Clear Glass Teapot with Infuser, Round Shape Infuser Tea Pot, Heat Resistant Borosilicate Glass Strainer Teapot, Stovetop Safe Tea Maker 450ML
features: 🎁Safe & Glass Teapot: The teapot is made of heat resistant borosilicate glass. PluieSoleil teapot is blown at high temperatures , safe healthy and harmless to use.
🎁This teapot is purely handmade, made of heat-resistant glass. The dishwasher's upper basin is secure or cleaned by hand
🎁304 stainless steel infuser - Fine and dense filter, suitable for all types of tea brewing. The spacious filter allows the tea leaves to fully expand and provide a complete infusion of the leaves.
🎁For Cold and Hot: The teapot can withstand instant temperature change from -20℃ to 150℃. It will remain unchanged even if you instantly fill boiling water into the frozen teapot.

🎁12 Months Warranty TeaPot: PluieSoleil teapots are guaranteed for 12 months. If you have any further questions about the teapot, please contact us immediately and we will get back to you within 12 hours, wishing you a happy life.
description: Product Description What is a tea meditation? Drinking tea can represent any of the everyday tasks and activities we do but by its nature, tea introduces calm, tea introduces the idea of a ritual. Tea and meditation go perfectly together because tea is an invitation to meditation. The tea meditation starts with the moment when you decide to make yourself a tea and you’re heading towards your kettle. You already made the first step for achieving a bit of calm in your day. It means you stopped whatever you were doing and you can use this time to clear your mind. Find calm during your day with a tea meditation – the perfect way to blend the love for tea with mindfulness. Try this simple mindfulness technique with your next cup of tea. Material - High borosilicate glass PluieSoleil teapots use high quality high borosilicate to make this teapot, this material is not only safe and non-toxic, but also can withstand higher temperature difference( -20°~130° ), which is safer. Whether you heat it directly or put it in the fridge, you can use it with confidence. More safely The tea infuser of PluieSoleil teapot is made of high-quality food-grade 304 stainless steel, which is more resistant to corrosion, rust and high temperature, so you can use it with confidence. Easy to clean The spacious opening and rounded shape of this teapot leaves no hard-to-clean areas, and it cleans very well, whether you wash it by hand or put it in the dishwasher! 450ML Teapot PluieSoleil Clear Glass Teapot with Infuser, Round Shape Infuser Tea Pot, Hea...
